prompt:
nh-5-amino-1mq-3ml-dark-white: Pharmaceutical vial product photography, vertical 4:5 portrait composition. TWO REFERENCE IMAGES are provided. The FIRST reference is the NAVY 3ML-DARK BASELINE — the canonical TYPOGRAPHY / LAYOUT / VIAL / BAR ANCHOR. Reproduce from it exactly: label layout, vertical text positioning (text block sits LOW on the label with a generous empty white logo zone above), typeface, font weights, letter spacing, edge-to-edge bottom bar, amber-tinted dark-brown glass 3ml vial, lighting, and shadow. The SECOND reference is the CAP COLOR ANCHOR — match its bright white cap color and bottom accent bar color exactly. Vial geometry and label layout come from the FIRST reference, NOT the second. Cap color must be EXACTLY hex #FFFFFF, do not drift lighter or darker, do not shift hue. Vial size: amber-tinted dark-brown glass 3ml vial.

LABEL VERTICAL LAYOUT — the entire text block sits LOW on the label. The TOP roughly 70 percent of the label is COMPLETELY BLANK pristine white space — no text, no logos, no marks. ALL TEXT lives in the LOWER 30 percent of the label.

LABEL MATERIAL: pristine opaque matte white, completely uniform across its surface — NO translucency, NO see-through to the glass behind it, NO dark patches, NO ghosting, NO discoloration. Only natural soft photographic shadow at the curved edges.

LABEL TEXT TOP TO BOTTOM (all in the lower 30% of the label, all in Helvetica Neue clean sans-serif):
(1) Product name '5-Amino 1MQ' in bold weight 700 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (~700) in dark charcoal grey, perfectly horizontally centered, natural letter proportions (NOT stretched, NOT condensed).
(2) Directly below with tight spacing, the dose-and-volume line 'xx mg · 3 ml' in bold weight 700 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (same bold weight as product name) at roughly 60 percent of the product-name size, charcoal grey, perfectly centered, single middle-dot separator. The 'xx' must be rendered LITERALLY as two lowercase letter x characters — intentional dose placeholder, NOT a number.
(3) Below the dose with a small gap, two stacked compliance lines in thin weight 300 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (~300, NOT bold), all-caps, medium grey, ~22 percent of the product-name size, tight line spacing. Line 1: 'FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY'. Line 2: 'NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION'. Both centered, equal size and weight.
(4) Below the second compliance line with a small gap, the lot line 'LOT: NH-1024' in thin weight 300 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (NOT bold), same small size, medium grey, single line, perfectly horizontally centered with equal left and right margins.

BAR — at the very bottom edge of the label, the slim solid accent bar at exactly hex #B0B0B0 (medium grey, since the cap is white) must run UNINTERRUPTED EDGE-TO-EDGE across the FULL WIDTH of the label, from the absolute leftmost edge to the absolute rightmost edge — NO gap, NO truncation, NO fade-out, NO white space at either end.

ABSOLUTELY NO hairlines, NO horizontal rules anywhere on the label other than the single bottom bar. Sharp focus, high resolution, premium pharmaceutical product shot, clinical minimalist aesthetic on a clean studio white background.

CRITICAL: render every text string exactly as written — '5-Amino 1MQ', 'xx mg · 3 ml' (with two lowercase x's, NOT a number), 'FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY', 'NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION', 'LOT: NH-1024'. CRITICAL POSITIONING: text block sits low on the label; upper 70% empty white. CRITICAL CAP: hex #FFFFFF exact. ABSOLUTE: do NOT render any font name, typeface name, or styling instruction (e.g. "HELVETICA", "BOLD", "LIGHT", "700", "300") as visible text anywhere on the label. The only visible text is the product name, the dose line, the two compliance lines, and the LOT line. WHITE-CAP BAR EMPHASIS: the bottom accent bar must be a VISIBLE medium grey (hex #B0B0B0), clearly distinct from the white label background — NOT pure white, NOT invisible. The bar must be unambiguously visible against the white label.

LABEL MATERIAL: pristine opaque matte white, completely uniform across its surface — NO translucency, NO see-through to the glass behind it, NO dark patches, NO ghosting, NO discoloration. Only natural soft photographic shadow at the curved edges.

LABEL TEXT TOP TO BOTTOM (all in the lower 30% of the label, all in Helvetica Neue clean sans-serif):
(1) Product name 'Tesamorelin' in bold weight 700 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (~700) in dark charcoal grey, perfectly horizontally centered, natural letter proportions (NOT stretched, NOT condensed).
(2) Directly below with tight spacing, the dose-and-volume line 'xx mg · 5 ml' in bold weight 700 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (same bold weight as product name) at roughly 60 percent of the product-name size, charcoal grey, perfectly centered, single middle-dot separator. The 'xx' must be rendered LITERALLY as two lowercase letter x characters — intentional dose placeholder, NOT a number.
(3) Below the dose with a small gap, two stacked compliance lines in thin weight 300 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (~300, NOT bold), all-caps, medium grey, ~22 percent of the product-name size, tight line spacing. Line 1: 'FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY'. Line 2: 'NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION'. Both centered, equal size and weight.
(4) Below the second compliance line with a small gap, the lot line 'LOT: NH-1024' in thin weight 300 sans-serif (do not render this style description as text on the label) (NOT bold), same small size, medium grey, single line, perfectly horizontally centered with equal left and right margins.

BAR — at the very bottom edge of the label, the slim solid accent bar at exactly hex #90B0C8 must run UNINTERRUPTED EDGE-TO-EDGE across the FULL WIDTH of the label, from the absolute leftmost edge to the absolute rightmost edge — NO gap, NO truncation, NO fade-out, NO white space at either end.

ABSOLUTELY NO hairlines, NO horizontal rules anywhere on the label other than the single bottom bar. Sharp focus, high resolution, premium pharmaceutical product shot, clinical minimalist aesthetic on a clean studio white background.

CRITICAL: render every text string exactly as written — 'Tesamorelin', 'xx mg · 5 ml' (with two lowercase x's, NOT a number), 'FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY', 'NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION', 'LOT: NH-1024'. CRITICAL POSITIONING: text block sits low on the label; upper 70% empty white. CRITICAL CAP: hex #90B0C8 exact. ABSOLUTE: do NOT render any font name, typeface name, or styling instruction (e.g. "HELVETICA", "BOLD", "LIGHT", "700", "300") as visible text anywhere on the label. The only visible text is the product name, the dose line, the two compliance lines, and the LOT line.
